fsca_compliance_report.regulatory_framework: Financial Sector Conduct Authority (FSCA) - Market Infrastructure Rules

data_sources.data_quality_status: DEGRADED - CIS unavailable for 1 counterparty, degraded for 1 counterparty

risk_assessment_summary.methodology: Multi-factor risk scoring based on obligation size, counterparty creditworthiness, securities lending gaps, and operational risk factors

TRD-2001.agent_decision: Settlement roll recommended due to high exposure and LOLR capacity constraints

TRD-2007.classification_rationale: Large obligation with CIS connectivity failure
TRD-2007.agent_decision: Human escalation required - inability to assess real-time risk due to system unavailability

settlement_rolls.regulatory_justification: FSCA Market Infrastructure Rule 4.2.1 - Settlement failure prevention through temporal risk mitigation

human_escalations.regulatory_justification: FSCA Rule 3.1.5 - Human oversight required when automated risk assessment systems are impaired

agent_decision_rationale.risk_scoring_agent: Applied LARGE_OBLIGATION and MODERATE_EXPOSURE thresholds per established risk framework. 2 trades exceeded ZAR 50M threshold triggering HIGH classification.
agent_decision_rationale.counterparty_assessment_agent: Detailed analysis performed on HIGH risk items. CP-001 assessed as liquidity risk with standard urgency. CP-007 escalated due to CIS unavailability preventing proper risk assessment.
agent_decision_rationale.intervention_orchestrator: Settlement roll selected for TRD-2001 due to LOLR capacity insufficient for 1M unit requirement. Human escalation triggered for TRD-2007 per CIS unavailability protocol.

cis_unavailable_flags.impact: Unable to assess lending balance, margin status, or real-time creditworthiness
cis_unavailable_flags.regulatory_implication: Heightened settlement risk due to incomplete risk assessment

cis_degraded_flags.impact: Delayed or potentially stale counterparty financial data

data_quality_attestation.data_completeness: 87.5% - 7 of 8 counterparties with full data availability

regulatory_compliance_summary.fsca_rule_4_2_1_compliance: COMPLIANT - Settlement failure prevention measures activated for high-risk positions
regulatory_compliance_summary.fsca_rule_3_1_5_compliance: COMPLIANT - Human escalation triggered for impaired system scenarios

systemic_risk_indicators.trend_analysis: STABLE - no significant deterioration vs prior cycle

recommendations: Immediate restoration of CIS connectivity for CP-007 to enable proper risk monitoring
Review settlement roll execution for TRD-2001 to confirm successful implementation
Monitor CP-003 CIS degradation for potential escalation to unavailable status
Consider increasing LOLR capacity thresholds for large Naspers positions given recurring high exposures
